summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NEW Inventario module and auto-approve registration feature. All backend APIs (98% pass rate) and frontend UI flows working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Reservation overlap detection working as expected (409 conflict)

passed_tests: AUTH: Registration auto-approves users (status='approved') and returns token immediately
AUTH: New users can login immediately after registration (no pending state)
REGISTER FORM: Cargo dropdown present with 4 options (Jefe, Coordinador, Gerente, Director comercial)
REGISTER FORM: Área dropdown present with 9 options (ECCP, Negocios País, etc.)
INVENTARIO ACCESS (Backend): Walter (Tienda) CAN access /api/inventory/* (200)
INVENTARIO ACCESS (Backend): Samuel (Negocios País) CANNOT access /api/inventory/* (403)
INVENTARIO ACCESS (Backend): Admin CAN access /api/inventory/* (200)
INVENTARIO ACCESS (Frontend): Walter sees 'Inventario' in sidebar and can access page
INVENTARIO ACCESS (Frontend): Samuel does NOT see 'Inventario' in sidebar
INVENTARIO ACCESS (Frontend): Samuel visiting /inventario redirects to / (dashboard)
GET /api/inventory/meta: Returns correct sucursales [H1, H2, H4, H5, H6]
GET /api/inventory/catalog?q=mart: Autocomplete returns matching articles
GET /api/inventory/summary: Returns per-branch totals (items_count, total_qty)
GET /api/inventory/stock?sucursal=H1: Returns stock rows for specific branch
POST /api/inventory/intake: Successfully adds stock and creates 'entrada' movement
POST /api/inventory/intake (validation): Empty article returns 400
POST /api/inventory/movement: Successfully deducts stock and creates 'salida' movement
POST /api/inventory/movement (validation): Missing description returns 400
POST /api/inventory/movement (validation): Quantity > available returns 409 'Stock insuficiente'
GET /api/inventory/movements: Returns movement history with entrada/salida types
FRONTEND Productos tab: Article autocomplete working
FRONTEND Productos tab: Quantity input working
FRONTEND Productos tab: Sucursal select working (H1-H6)
FRONTEND Productos tab: Save button creates intake successfully
FRONTEND Productos tab: Success toast appears after save
FRONTEND Productos tab: New intake appears in 'Ingresos recientes' list
FRONTEND Tiendas tab: All 5 branch cards visible (H1, H2, H4, H5, H6)
FRONTEND Tiendas tab: Branch cards show totals (items_count, total_qty)
FRONTEND Tiendas tab: Clicking branch card shows stock rows
FRONTEND Tiendas tab: Search input filters stock by article name
FRONTEND Movimientos tab: Sucursal select working
FRONTEND Movimientos tab: Article autocomplete shows available stock
FRONTEND Movimientos tab: Quantity input working
FRONTEND Movimientos tab: Description input working (required field)
FRONTEND Movimientos tab: Solicitante input working (optional field)
FRONTEND Movimientos tab: Save button registers rebaja successfully
FRONTEND Movimientos tab: Success toast appears after save
FRONTEND Movimientos tab: Movement appears in history with correct type (Salida)
FRONTEND Movimientos tab: Movement history shows entrada/salida with quantities
